# `/weather` Command
Sets the weather.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/weather <type: WeatherType> [duration: int]`

### `/weather query`

## Arguments
- `duration`: int
- `type`: WeatherType

## Enums
### `WeatherType`

#### Values
- `clear`
- `rain`
- `thunder`
